ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The skill chain has reached the maximum allowed depth. The conversation has been saved.
ast.target: 技能链已达到允许的最大深度。对话已保存。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Recommended: A full rebuild is required to enable bilingual tag support for existing notes.
ast.target: 建议：需要完全重建才能为现有笔记启用双语标签支持。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组（Uint8Array）支持。如果您需要旧版浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Horme Brain: Failed to parse Tag History
ast.target: Horme Brain：解析标签历史记录失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: Horme Brain: Index failed to load within timeout. Aborting queue to prevent data loss.
ast.target: Horme Brain：索引在超时时间内加载失败。中止队列以防止数据丢失。

ast.name: error
ast.target: Horme 维基百科技能错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: Horme Vault 链接技能错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: Horme 语法学者技能错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: Horme 维基词典技能错误：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Horme Fetch and Summarise Skill Error:
ast.target: Horme 抓取与总结技能错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 显示在技能下拉菜单中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One line shown under the name.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use {{query}} where the user's input should go.
ast.target: 在用户输入应放置的位置使用 {{query}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One per line: Key: Value. Use {{secret:your-secret-id}} to avoid storing tokens in data.json.
ast.target: 每行一个：键: 值。使用 {{secret:your-secret-id}} 以避免在 data.json 中存储令牌。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Monitor integrity of your local intelligence.
ast.target: 监控本地智能的完整性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select from running models or type a custom name.
ast.target: 从正在运行的模型中选择或输入自定义名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stored in Obsidian Secret Storage (not in data.json).
ast.target: 存储在 Obsidian 密钥存储中（不在 data.json 中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a suggestion or type any custom model ID.
ast.target: 选择一个建议或输入任何自定义模型 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate per response. Default: 8192. Raise this for long documents or complex writing tasks. Check your provider's documentation for model-specific limits.
ast.target: 模型每次响应可生成的最大令牌数。默认值：8192。对于长文档或复杂写作任务，请提高此值。请查阅提供商的文档以了解特定模型的限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of characters injected from "+ Add folders" per message (combined across selected folders). If exceeded, Horme truncates the folder context and you should use "+ Add notes" to pick specific files. Default: 40000.
ast.target: 每条消息从“+ 添加文件夹”注入的最大字符数（跨所选文件夹的总和）。如果超出，Horme 会截断文件夹上下文，您应使用“+ 添加笔记”来选择特定文件。默认值：40000。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable extra logs in the developer console (may include file paths). Leave off for normal use.
ast.target: 在开发者控制台中启用额外日志（可能包含文件路径）。正常使用时请保持关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically switch to a specific provider/model when on a mobile device.
ast.target: 在移动设备上时自动切换到特定的提供商/模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder in your vault containing grammar rules for your primary language.
ast.target: 您的保险库中包含主要语言语法规则的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The language your grammar manuals cover. Proofreading will only consult grammar manuals when the text is in this language.
ast.target: 您的语法手册涵盖的语言。校对仅在文本使用此语言时才会查阅语法手册。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Synchronise the skill with the latest content in your grammar manuals folder.
ast.target: 将技能与语法手册文件夹中的最新内容同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The frontmatter key where generated summaries are stored (e.g. 'summary', 'resumen', 'abstract').
ast.target: 存储生成摘要的 frontmatter 键（例如 'summary'、'resumen'、'abstract'）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The language summaries should be written in.
ast.target: 语言摘要应使用以下语言撰写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional: A note containing a list of allowed tags (one per line).
ast.target: 可选：包含允许标签列表的注释（每行一个）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The exact model used for tag generation. Leave blank to use the current chat model. For local providers, type the model name or pick from the dropdown. For cloud providers, type any valid model ID.
ast.target: 用于标签生成的确切模型。留空则使用当前聊天模型。对于本地提供者，请输入模型名称或从下拉列表中选择。对于云提供者，请输入任何有效的模型ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically surface related notes in a sidebar panel as you write. (Requires Vault Brain to be enabled and indexed).
ast.target: 在您撰写时，自动在侧边栏面板中显示相关笔记。（需要启用并索引 Vault Brain）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clicking a connection opens it in a new split pane instead of replacing the active view.
ast.target: 点击连接将在新的分屏窗格中打开它，而不是替换活动视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how connections are rendered in the sidebar.
ast.target: 选择连接在侧边栏中的渲染方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: WARNING: If enabled, snippets from your notes will be sent to cloud servers. This reduces privacy.
ast.target: 警告：如果启用，您笔记中的片段将被发送到云服务器。这会降低隐私性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically translates your tags into a second language during indexing. This 'shadows' your tags so that search queries in either language will find the note. (Note: This only affects the AI Index; it will never modify your actual note files or tags.)
ast.target: 在索引期间自动将您的标签翻译成第二种语言。这会‘影子化’您的标签，以便使用任一语言的搜索查询都能找到该笔记。（注意：这仅影响 AI 索引；它永远不会修改您的实际笔记文件或标签。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The language that tags will be translated into.
ast.target: 标签将被翻译成的语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Horme may send tag strings (not note contents) to a cloud provider for higher-quality translation. Tag names may still contain sensitive information.
ast.target: 如果启用，Horme 可能会将标签字符串（非笔记内容）发送给云提供者以获得更高质量的翻译。标签名称仍可能包含敏感信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Primary provider used for tag translation during indexing. This is independent of the Chat Provider.
ast.target: 索引期间用于标签翻译的主要提供者。这与聊天提供者无关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model used on the selected cloud provider for tag translation. Only tag strings are sent (not note contents).
ast.target: 在选定的云提供者上用于标签翻译的模型。仅发送标签字符串（非笔记内容）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used if the cloud provider is unavailable (no internet, API error, etc).
ast.target: 在云提供者不可用时使用（无网络、API错误等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run a sample of your vault tags through the translation model to verify output quality before rebuilding the index. Uses the Tag Translation Provider and Model configured above.
ast.target: 将您保险库标签的样本通过翻译模型运行，以在重建索引前验证输出质量。使用上面配置的标签翻译提供者和模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Caps how many highlight segments are indexed per note (prevents over-highlighted notes dominating cost).
ast.target: 限制每个笔记索引的高亮片段数量（防止过度高亮的笔记主导成本）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Smoothing constant for Reciprocal Rank Fusion (Default: 60).
ast.target: 倒数排名融合的平滑常数（默认值：60）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum priority bonus given to exact keyword matches in titles, tags, and summaries (Default: 0.25)
ast.target: 在标题、标签和摘要中精确关键词匹配的最大优先级加成（默认值：0.25）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum priority bonus given to exact keyword matches found deep inside the note body (Default: 0.20)
ast.target: 在笔记正文深处找到的精确关键词匹配的最大优先级加成（默认值：0.20）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional comma or newline-separated globs for which files are indexed by Vault Brain. Leave blank to include all. Requires a rebuild.
ast.target: 可选的逗号或换行符分隔的 glob 模式，用于指定 Vault Brain 索引哪些文件。留空则包含所有文件。需要重建索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional comma or newline-separated globs to exclude files from Vault Brain indexing. Requires a rebuild.
ast.target: 可选的逗号或换行符分隔的 glob 模式，用于从 Vault Brain 索引中排除文件。需要重建索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Vault Brain will index PDFs by using extracted text from the community plugin "Text Extractor" (plugin id: text-extractor). Requires a rebuild.
ast.target: 如果启用，Vault Brain 将通过使用社区插件“Text Extractor”（插件ID：text-extractor）提取的文本来索引 PDF。需要重建索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where concept notes will be created.
ast.target: 创建概念笔记的文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 文件夹上下文限制（字符数）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每个笔记最大高亮字符数

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最大 PDF 提取文本（字符数）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search notes to add as context…
ast.target: 搜索笔记以添加为上下文…

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search folders to add as context…
ast.target: 搜索文件夹以添加为上下文…

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Look up Spanish words in the RAE dictionary.
ast.target: 在 RAE 词典中查找西班牙语单词。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: ⚠️ Vault Brain is disabled for cloud providers to protect your privacy.
ast.target: ⚠️ 为保护您的隐私，Vault Brain 对云提供者已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to insert footnote. Check console for details.
ast.target: 插入脚注失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Horme：前置元数据 API 不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault Brain: Embedding model changed. Index cleared — please rebuild.
ast.target: Vault Brain：嵌入模型已更改。索引已清除 — 请重新构建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault Brain: Please wait for indexing to finish before deleting the index.
ast.target: Vault Brain：请等待索引完成后再删除索引。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault Brain: Indexing is already in progress.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault Brain: Vault Brain is disabled in settings.
ast.target: Vault Brain：Vault Brain 在设置中已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Please wait for tag indexing to finish.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Tag indexing is already in progress.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: ● 语法学者：已查阅本地手册。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: ● 抓取与总结：正在读取文章...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme Grammar: Indexing is already in progress.
ast.target: Horme 语法：索引已在进行中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Generating Grammar Index (view progress in status bar)...
ast.target: Horme：正在生成语法索引（在状态栏查看进度）...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Please wait for grammar indexing to finish.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Cannot change skill mode while generating.
ast.target: Horme：生成过程中无法更改技能模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Cannot change model while generating.
ast.target: Horme：生成过程中无法更改模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Cannot change preset while generating.
ast.target: Horme：生成过程中无法更改预设。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Horme：最多 5 个上下文笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: No notes found in that folder.
ast.target: Horme：在该文件夹中未找到笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Skill configuration error: no primary parameter defined.
ast.target: 技能配置错误：未定义主参数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Current note context not sent.
ast.target: Horme：当前笔记上下文未发送。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Maximum skill depth reached. Stopping skill loop. (conversation saved)
ast.target: Horme：已达到最大技能深度。停止技能循环。（对话已保存）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: URL must include {{query}} placeholder for GET requests.
ast.target: URL 必须包含 {{query}} 占位符用于 GET 请求。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 搜索权重已恢复为默认值。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未检测到 Vault 索引。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 笔记已成功转换为 DOCX。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: No tags found in vault.
ast.target: Horme：在 Vault 中未找到标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Horme：已达到最大技能迭代次数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Open a markdown note first.
ast.target: Horme：请先打开一个 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Note is too short to summarise.
ast.target: Horme：笔记太短，无法生成摘要。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Could not open chat panel.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Connections feature is disabled in settings.
ast.target: Horme：连接功能在设置中已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Horme: Could not open connections panel.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search term or claim to verify.
ast.target: 要验证的搜索词或声明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wikipedia language code (e.g. 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.
ast.target: 维基百科语言代码（例如 'en' 代表英语，'es' 代表西班牙语）。默认为 'en'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specific words or grammatical constructions to verify (e.g., 'eventualmente', 'subjunctive').
ast.target: 要验证的特定词语或语法结构（例如 'eventualmente'、'subjunctive'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The complete sentence where the term is used, enabling contextual rule matching.
ast.target: 使用该术语的完整句子，用于启用上下文规则匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wiktionary language code (e.g. 'en' for English, 'es' for Spanish). Defaults to 'en'.
ast.target: 维基词典语言代码（例如 'en' 代表英语，'es' 代表西班牙语）。默认为 'en'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query or claim to look up.
ast.target: 要查找的搜索查询或声明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One of: 'difference' (time between two dates), 'day_of_week' (what day was a date), 'add' (add days/months/years to a date).
ast.target: 操作类型之一：'difference'（两个日期之间的时间差）、'day_of_week'（某个日期是星期几）、'add'（向日期添加天数/月数/年数）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 第一个日期，格式为 YYYY-MM-DD（例如 '1969-07-20'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Second date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required for 'difference' operation.
ast.target: 第二个日期，格式为 YYYY-MM-DD。'difference' 操作必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Amount to add, e.g. '30 days', '6 months', '2 years'. Required for 'add' operation.
ast.target: 要添加的数量，例如 '30 days'、'6 months'、'2 years'。'add' 操作必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text to process with this skill.
ast.target: 要使用此技能处理的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The term or concept to research and save.
ast.target: 要研究并保存的术语或概念。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wikipedia language code to use (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Defaults to the user's language when possible, otherwise 'en'.
ast.target: 要使用的维基百科语言代码（例如 'en'、'es'、'fr'）。尽可能默认为用户语言，否则为 'en'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full HTTP or HTTPS URL of the online article to scrape.
ast.target: 要抓取的在线文章的完整 HTTP 或 HTTPS URL。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前笔记转换为 DOCX

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 例如：西班牙语、法语、日语

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用当前笔记作为上下文

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a note to see related connections.
ast.target: 打开一个笔记以查看相关连接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This note has not been indexed yet.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use {{query}} as a placeholder for the user's input in the URL and body. For sensitive values (API keys/tokens), use {{secret:your-secret-id}} in headers/body to pull from Obsidian Secret Storage.
ast.target: 在 URL 和请求体中使用 {{query}} 作为用户输入的占位符。对于敏感值（API 密钥/令牌），请在请求头/请求体中使用 {{secret:your-secret-id}} 从 Obsidian 密钥存储中提取。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Privacy note: Only tag strings (frontmatter tags and inline #tags) are sent to the cloud for translation — never note content.
ast.target: 隐私说明：仅标签字符串（前置信息标签和内联 #标签）会被发送到云端进行翻译——绝不会发送笔记内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Contacting model — this may take 10–30 seconds on a local LLM...
ast.target: 正在联系模型——在本地 LLM 上这可能需要 10-30 秒…

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tags found in the sampled vault files. Make sure you have notes with Obsidian tags and that the index has been built.
ast.target: 在抽样的知识库文件中未找到标签。请确保您有包含 Obsidian 标签的笔记，并且索引已构建完成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom skills yet. Add one below.
ast.target: 暂无自定义技能。请在下方添加一个。
